goal: Ship-ready Aether v2: close the loops the Dreamer found (wisdom plumbing, midden reviews, monolith decomposition, TO-DOS cleanup), push to hub, and prepare for other repos to use

phases.name: Fix Wisdom Plumbing
phases.description: Fix when-when stutter across 4 locations, fix instinct-create locking bug, add instinct-apply subcommand

tasks.description: Fix when-when stutter in seal.md (Claude + OpenCode) — strip leading when from trigger before prepending When
Fix when-when in prompt-print display (aether-utils.sh line 7714)
Fix learning-promote-auto trigger format (line 5509) — remove When prefix from auto-created triggers
Fix instinct-create locking bug — add acquire_lock/release_lock around COLONY_STATE.json mutation
Add instinct-apply subcommand — records application outcomes and adjusts confidence

success_criteria: No When-when stutter in any instinct display or hive promotion
instinct-create holds lock during state mutation

phases.name: Add Midden Review Mechanism
phases.description: Add midden-review and midden-acknowledge subcommands to close the midden feedback loop

tasks.description: Add midden-review subcommand — lists unacknowledged failures grouped by category with filtering
Add midden-acknowledge subcommand — marks entries as addressed with a reason
Write tests for midden-review and midden-acknowledge (6 test cases)

phases.name: Extract Utility Groups from Monolith
phases.description: Extract hive-* (548 lines) and midden-* subcommands from aether-utils.sh into .aether/utils/ files

tasks.description: Extract hive-init/store/read/abstract/promote into .aether/utils/hive.sh — preserve LOCK_DIR save/restore pattern
Run full test suite and validate-package.sh to verify zero regressions

success_criteria: All tests pass with zero regressions

phases.name: Clean Up Documentation
phases.description: Update TO-DOS.md, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, and CLAUDE.md to reflect v2.0.0 reality

tasks.description: Audit TO-DOS.md — mark 8+ implemented items as done, keep genuinely pending items, remove superseded items
Update README.md — version to v2.0.0, command count to 43, expand caste table to 22 agents, add v2 features
Write CHANGELOG [2.0.0] entry with Added/Fixed/Changed sections documenting all v2 features
Update CLAUDE.md Quick Reference — line count, subcommand count, add new subcommands to tables

success_criteria: TO-DOS.md only shows genuinely pending work
README.md shows v2.0.0 with accurate counts

phases.name: Version Bump and Publish Prep
phases.description: Bump package.json to 2.0.0, run full validation, verify hub install works

tasks.description: Run full validation: npm test + validate-package.sh + npm pack --dry-run
Run npm install -g . to push to hub and verify hub setup works

success_criteria: Other repos can pull v2 via aether update

learnings.claim: Archaeologist pre-build scans catch latent bugs in recently-added code that was never tested in production (jq path .instincts vs .memory.instincts)
learnings.evidence: Strata-8 found seal.md used wrong jq path — builders fixed it alongside the stutter fix

learnings.claim: When fixing one bug in a code block, checking the surrounding 10 lines often reveals related bugs in the same commit
learnings.evidence: When-when stutter fix exposed adjacent jq path bug — both introduced in same commit 839ddf2

learnings.claim: Trap-based lock cleanup (acquire -> trap EXIT -> work -> trap - EXIT -> release) prevents deadlocks on error paths
learnings.evidence: instinct-create locking fix uses canonical pattern from flag-add, 7 tests pass including lock cleanup test

learnings.claim: Combining related subcommands (review+acknowledge) into a single builder task produces cleaner, more consistent APIs than splitting across workers
learnings.evidence: Mason-87 built both subcommands with consistent argument patterns and shared jq expressions, 6 tests pass

learnings.claim: Extracting bash case blocks into sourced function files requires changing positional parameter references ($2 to $1) since functions receive arguments differently than case blocks
learnings.evidence: Chaos Ant found midden-recent-failures $2 bug after extraction — limit arg was silently ignored until fixed to $1

learnings.claim: Source-and-delegate extraction pattern preserves behavior when shared infrastructure (json_ok, json_err, error constants, LOCK_DIR) is defined before the source line
learnings.evidence: 576 tests pass after extracting 9 subcommands with zero behavioral changes

instincts.trigger: fixing a bug in recently-added code
instincts.action: check the surrounding lines in the same commit for related bugs
evidence: When-when fix exposed adjacent jq path bug — both from same commit

instincts.trigger: adding file locking to a case block in aether-utils.sh
instincts.action: use the trap-based pattern: acquire -> trap EXIT -> work -> trap - EXIT -> release
evidence: Canonical pattern from flag-add, confirmed by 3 prior deadlock bug fixes

instincts.trigger: extracting bash case blocks into sourced function files
instincts.action: audit positional parameter references — case blocks use script args, functions use function args
evidence: midden-recent-failures limit bug: $2 worked in case block but needed $1 in function

instincts.trigger: building related read+write subcommands for the same data store
instincts.action: assign to a single builder to ensure consistent argument patterns and shared jq logic
evidence: midden-review and midden-acknowledge built together with consistent API
